title: Know the Risk Before You Route
text:
Know the Risk Before You Route
  Llano is a risk quantification API for fleet truck routes — giving logistics teams real-time, data-driven risk scores to make smarter dispatch decisions.
  Request Early Access




  What Llano Does
  
    
      🛣️
      Route Risk Scoring
      Get a composite risk score for any truck route based on road conditions, traffic patterns, and historical incident data.
    
    
      ⚡
      Real-Time Analysis
      Live risk updates as conditions change — weather, construction, and traffic events reflected instantly.
    
    
      🔌
      Simple API Integration
      RESTful API designed for easy integration with TMS, dispatch, and fleet management platforms.
    
    
      📊
      Fleet-Level Insights
      Aggregate risk metrics across your entire fleet to identify patterns and reduce incident rates over time.
    
  




  Ready to de-risk your routes?
  Llano is currently in early access. Join the waitlist and be first to integrate.
  Get Early Access
